addToCollection(uint256).notice: Add a title to your personal on-chain collection. Reverts on duplicate.

addToCollectionSponsored(uint256,address.notice: Add a title to a user's collection (for gas sponsorship).

getAverageRating(uint256).notice: Average scaled by 100 (e.g. 425 = 4.25 stars). Returns 0 if unrated.

getMovieStats(uint256).notice: Bundles totalScore, ratingCount, and averageScaled into one call.

getUserCollection(address).notice: Returns all TMDB/offset ids currently in a user's collection.

markAsWatched(uint256,bool).notice: Toggle watched status. Pass `watched = true` to mark watched, false to unmark.

markAsWatchedSponsored(uint256,bool,addr.notice: Toggle watched status for a user (for gas sponsorship).

rateMovie(uint256,uint8).notice: Rate a title 1–5 stars. Calling again updates your existing rating;         the second call never inflates the count or the sum.

rateMovieSponsored(uint256,uint8,address.notice: Rate a title on behalf of a user (for gas sponsorship).         Only works with sponsor wallet which is whitelisted.

removeFromCollection(uint256).notice: Remove a title from your collection. Reverts if not present.

removeFromCollectionSponsored(uint256,ad.notice: Remove a title from a user's collection (for gas sponsorship).

userdoc.notice: One-wallet-one-vote community rating system + personal collection + watched tracking.         Each wallet can only ever cast ONE active rating per title — updating your score         replaces the old one rather than adding a second vote. This makes the average         tamper-resistant against bot-farming from a single address.         Movies use their TMDB movie id directly.         TV series use their TMDB tv id offset by 1_000_000_000 (done in the frontend)         so the two numbering spaces cannot collide.
